历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 30997 → 31810 → 31556 → 35261 → 33486, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. A significant backward shift occurred in 2024 (35261), with a slight recovery to 33486 in 2025; the cumulative backward shift over the past 5 years is about 2489, with considerable fluctuation. The enrollment plan for Physics Category in Guangdong Province was 71 in 2021–2022, 72 in 2023, 69 in 2024–2025, and remains 69 in 2026, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction, thus no direct impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it ranked 67th in 2021 → 60th in 2024 → 67th in 2025 → 73rd in 2026, with a slight decline in recent years but still at the mid-level of the national top 100, with stable academic strength. The university did not appear in reputation and public opinion files from 2021 to 2026, with no major positive or negative events; its Douyin popularity did not enter the national top 106, indicating average attention on short video platforms; there were no records in the abnormal admission files from 2021 to 2025, with stable admission trends and no signs of gaps or sharp drops; fifth-round discipline.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity. The university is primarily characterized by petroleum and petrochemicals, with related chemical majors having low social popularity (biology, chemistry, environment, materials are clearly discouraged). In 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in Guangdong Province is about 456,000, an increase of approximately 3.6% from 440,208 in 2025, intensifying competition. The university is located in Qingdao, Shandong Province, not a local university in Guangdong, with no regional admission preference in Guangdong.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating backward trend of historical rankings, the 2026 enrollment plan unchanged from 2025, the approximately 3.6% increase in Physics Category examinees in Guangdong intensifying competition, a slight decline in Soft Science ranking, and stable reputation and popularity, competition is expected to intensify slightly based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 33486. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 33636, with a range of 33136–34136.

The university has distinctive petroleum and petrochemical characteristics, with stable employment in related industries, but the social popularity of corresponding majors is low. Examinees should consider personal interests and career plans comprehensively.
